# Lunar Cycles of Faith
## Scripture
"For everything there is a season, and a time for every matter under heaven" - Ecclesiastes 3:1

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, the phases of the moon remind us of the seasons of our faith journey. Just as the moon waxes and wanes, our walk with God is marked by times of growth, times of refinement, and times of rest. In the full moon of spiritual abundance, we bask in the radiance of God's presence. In the new moon of uncertainty, we trust in the promise of His guidance. The lunar cycles teach us to be patient, to trust in the timing of God's plan, and to find beauty in every phase of our journey.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we observe the lunar cycles, remind us that our faith journey is a dynamic and ever-changing process. Help us to trust in Your sovereignty, to find comfort in Your presence, and to discover beauty in every season. May we, like the moon, reflect Your light to a world in need, and may our lives be a testament to Your faithfulness. As we navigate the ups and downs of life, guide us by the gentle glow of Your love, and fill us with the assurance that You are always with us, in every phase of our journey.
